PowerShell(cd "C:\\Users\\micha\\inovaProjetoTi\\SIGID"; node -e "const bcrypt = require\('bcrypt'\); const {Client} = require\('pg'\); \(async \(\) => { const hash = await bcrypt.hash\('Senha@123', 10\); const c = new Client\({host:'localhost',port:15432,user:'sigic',password:'sigic123',database:'sigic_dev'}\); await c.connect\(\); const r = await c.query\('UPDATE usuarios SET senha_hash = \\$1 WHERE email = \\$2 RETURNING email,nome',[hash,'michael.alessander@desenvolve-al.com.br']\); console.log\(r.rows[0]\); await c.end\(\); }\)\(\)")
